**Day 2 Mouchette Impressions** (Aggregated from current top EN players)

**Is Mouchette Powerful:** She is an ok, A~B tier dps. She can clear content. She is not top tier or overpowered. She won't break records unless you invest heavily and whale for her and her wheel

**Stopping Point for Pulls:** E3, but OE is good. I don't recommend using her before E3

**Best Teams:** Mouchette, Helot, Thais, Aigis/other supports. High investment accounts can also try mono chaos with Mouchette, Hameln, Ramona, Ryker/Alva

**Can I Use Her With Lotan/Gelot:** I don't recommend it as you will effectively have 2 dps on the team. A support that adds a damage multiplier to Mouchette, or adds defense or utility which Mouchette lacks, will be more effective than another dps

**Covenant:** Dreams of Medicine (recommended) or Burial Grounds' Sighs (if you have a good set). Prioritize Crit, Death Resist, Keyflare Regen

**Wheels:** Crit, Death Resist, Strike wheels work best. Best in slot are her own wheel + Lily wheel. Lotan wheel, Blade of the Titan, etc. are fine

**Should I Pull Mouchette:** If you like her.

**Should I Pull Mouchette Wheel:** If you are prepared to invest heavily in her. There are other wheels that can substitute

guys, any advise on "what's better choice"
i'm willing to spend extra $15 (because daum ch.9 was good), so i have three options:
1. Thais Christmas wheel
2. Salvador Christmas wheel
3. neither and do something else

so... is any of these two wheels viable in a long run, given that i have Thais and Mouchette E3 (no Salvador...yet) as those who probably can put these to good use?
both are solid wheels, but at a $15 limit I'm unsure I'd recommend either

though at $15 your main options (assuming you're looking for more than just pulls) are really going to be a wheel pack, a costume pack, or battlepass (getting a battlepass wheel once unlocks dupes for purchase in the sediment shop going forwards)

I'd suggest getting the monthly subscription + paid BP tier instead

The dupes are important in this game?
most characters are bad at 0 dupes
their kit fully unlocks at 2-3 dupes
so especially for your carry
u want to pull a lot
and many supports are less useful before a certain number of dupes as well
this game is very generous with pulls but u want more copies of characters
you can technically run with 0 dupes but you will find it really hard to do later stages and higher difficulty content
account will be kinda bricked
